This '''[[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]]''' was onboard a [[J-1 shuttle]] when [[Cade Skywalker]] and [[Shado Vao]] left [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

==Behing the scenes==
On one page, in two different panels, this Nautolan is colored both [[Color/Legends|green]] and blue.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] {{1st}}
